scripts.build: cd auto-entry && npm ci && npm run setup && npm run build
scripts.dev:auralink: cd auralink-ai/frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 NEXT_PUBLIC_PUBLISHING_API_URL=http://localhost:8001 npm run dev
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,publishing -c blue,green,magenta "cd auralink-ai/backend && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "cd auralink-ai/frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 NEXT_PUBLIC_PUBLISHING_API_URL=http://localhost:8001 npm run dev" "cd auralink-ai/publishing && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all:clean: sh -c 'for port in 8000 8001 3000 3001; do for p in $(lsof -ti :$port 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $p 2>/dev/null; done; done' && npm run dev:all
